menu.welcome:
*👋 Hi there, {{firstName}}!*

I am FilmFounder, your AI-powered movie search assistant.
Just click the button below, and I'll help you find that movie you've been thinking about.
menu.donate_text:
This project was created for learning and from the heart. 🎓

I don't accept monetary donations to avoid fighting German bureaucracy and taxes over every single Euro. 🇩🇪📜

© The best way to support me is by giving a star to this project on **GitHub**! It motivates me to keep developing. Thank you! ❤️

https://github.com/siakinnik/film-founder-bot

session.startPrompt:
📝 *I'm listening!*

Describe everything you remember (plot, actors, specific scenes). I'll do my best to identify it.

_You have several attempts within a session to provide more details._
session.sessionExists:
*You already have an active session.*
Please finish it or click "Continue" to add more details.
session.sessionStoped:
✅ *Search finished.*
I hope I was able to help! You can start a new session now.
session.sessionStopedByTimer:
⏱ *Session ended due to inactivity.*
You can start a new one anytime.
session.limitDayReached:
🛑 *Daily limit reached.*
Unfortunately, you've used up your sessions for today. Come back tomorrow!
session.limitReached:
⚠️ *Attempts exhausted.*
I can't respond further in this session. Please stop it and start a new one if you haven't found what you were looking for.

errors.quota_exceeded:
🤯 *Oops! The bot's brain is fried.*

The daily free limit for AI requests has been reached (Free Tier). Please come back tomorrow when the limits reset! 🌅
errors.overloaded:
⏳ *AI is currently overloaded.*
Google's servers are struggling. Please try sending your message again in a minute.
